Provides comprehensive mathematical models for economic systems, agent-based modeling, and financial analysis.

  • Classes in org.jscience.natural.engineering.eventdriven used by org.jscience.natural.biology
    Class
    Description
    Event
    Represents an event occurring in the system targeting a specific entity.
    EventDrivenEngine
    Run-time core of the event driven simulation engine.
    EventSpec
     
    SimulationAgent
    Interface for any object that can receive and process simulation events.
